== Notes for [[Item:Q3347|Q3347]] ==

http://www.archivesportaleurope.net/ead-display/-/ead/pl/aicode/ES-D708/type/fa/id/ES-47186-ARCHV-UD-184149/unitid/ES-47186-ARCHV-UD-184149+-+ES-47186-ARCHV-UD-4944676/search/0/Polanco

67051ADA89E521EFBBFA9822EF79916CB2CA
geni:6000000076406988860
